---
title: "article on French history"
---

## article on French history

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1892?
**Genre:** non-fiction, history
**Format:** article in journal

**Publisher:** Cassell?

### Notes

Letters to Arthur John Butler, then working for Cassell, suggest that CMY contributed an article on French mediaeval history to one of their journals in 1892.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
